    "one_sentence_positioning": "A deep practitioner and advocate of CLI-based AI coding agents who transforms chaotic 'vibe coding' into a structured, production-ready software development lifecycle (SDLC) using context engineering and deterministic feedback loops.",

      "insight": "The 'Plan & Act' workflow separates reasoning from execution: use a high-reasoning model (e.g., GPT-5.2 High) to create a detailed implementation plan, then use a coding model (e.g., Codex 5.3) to execute it.",
      "why_it_matters_for_experts_panel": "Provides a structured, scalable alternative to chaotic 'vibe coding', reducing token waste and improving code quality.",

      "evidence_refs": [

      "why_it_matters_for_experts_panel": "Solves the common problem of AI 'amnesia' across different chat sessions.",

  "practical_patterns": [
    {
      "pattern": "Suppressing test output in feedback loops using a bash wrapper (`run_silent.sh`).",
      "when_to_use": "When running automated tests in an AI agent loop to prevent the context window from filling up with 'TEST PASSED' logs.",
      "failure_modes": [
        "If the wrapper suppresses actual error details needed for debugging."
      ],
      "evidence_refs": [
        "P0140"
      ]
    },
    {
      "pattern": "Delegating research tasks to headless CLI subagents.",
      "when_to_use": "When you need the AI to explore a codebase or documentation without polluting the main chat's context window.",
      "failure_modes": [
        "If the subagent's output exceeds the headless mode response limits (mitigated by having the subagent write to a file)."
      ],
      "evidence_refs": [
        "P0123"
      ]
    },
    {
      "pattern": "Using `knip` (or similar tools) to clean up dead code after an AI coding session.",
      "when_to_use": "To remove unused types, interfaces, or functions left behind by iterative AI code generation.",
      "failure_modes": [
        "False positives from the tool deleting actually used code (requires manual review or strict type-checking afterward)."
      ],
      "evidence_refs": [
        "P0133"
      ]
    }
  ],
